steps.name: Given  I add "LYRASIS Reads" account from welcomeScreen
Then  Account 'LYRASIS Reads' is present on Accounts screen
When  I enter credentials for 'LYRASIS Reads' account
Then  Login is performed successfully
When  I open Catalog
And  I open search modal
When  I search 'available' book of distributor 'Axis 360' and bookType 'AUDIOBOOK' from "LYRASIS Reads" and save as 'bookNameInfo'
And  I switch to 'Audiobooks' catalog tab
And  Open AUDIOBOOK book with GET action button and 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
And  Click GET action button on book details screen
Then  I check that book contains LISTEN action button on book details screen
When  Click LISTEN action button on book details screen
Then  Audio player screen of book 'bookInfo' is opened
steps.statusMessage: Player of book The Hobbit is not opened

java.lang.AssertionError: Player of book The Hobbit is not opened

steps.name: When  Select 1.25X playback speed on playback speed audiobook screen
Then  Current playback speed value is 1.25X on audio player screen
When  Return to previous screen from audio player screen
And  Click LISTEN action button on book details screen
Then  Audio player screen of book 'bookInfo' is opened
And  Current playback speed value is 1.25X on audio player screen
When  I restart app
And  I open Books
And  Open AUDIOBOOK book with LISTEN action button and 'bookInfo' bookInfo on books screen
And  Click LISTEN action button on book details screen
Then  Audio player screen of book 'bookInfo' is opened
And  Current playback speed value is 1.25X on audio player screen
When  Tap play button on audio player screen
And  Save book play time as 'timeAhead' on audio player screen
And  Wait for 8 seconds
Then  Playback has been moved forward by 10 seconds from 'timeAhead' seconds on audio player screen
